description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a global before_script running `ls -l`, `mkdir bin`, and `export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin`, and a global after_script running `ls -l`. Add a job called `build_esticonsole` (using the default stage) that executes the exact commands `go get github.com/c9s/goprocinfo/linux`, `go get google.golang.org/grpc`, `go get github.com/jroimartin/gocui`, `go get github.com/nu7hatch/gouuid`, `go get github.com/howeyc/gopass`, and `./buildEverything.sh .`. Configure this job to produce an artifact named `EstiConsole_${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}` containing the `bin/` directory and set `untracked: false`.
